title: The Tell: 8 tech stocks poised to bounce after Nasdaq plunge, according to AI platform
text: Nvidia Corp. tops a list of technology stocks that would be expected to bounce back strongly over the next month based on the reaction to past plunges by the Nasdaq Composite, according to an artificial-intelligence-driven screening platform.

title: Jack Henry & Associates Names Greg Adelson Company President
text: MONETT, Mo., Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ:JKHY) announced today that Chief Operating Officer (COO) Greg Adelson will become President and COO of the company, effective immediately.

title: Jack Henry's (JKHY) Symitar Gets Selected by Two Credit Unions
text: Jack Henry & Associates' (JKHY) customer base gets a boost as Siouxland Federal Credit Union and Fulda Area Credit Union select Symitar to host core solution in a private cloud space.

title: IncredibleBank Selects Jack Henry to Compete with Same-Day Decisioning and Funding
text: MONETT, Mo., Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that IncredibleBank is improving its online account opening with personalized, dynamic content, same-day decisioning and fast, easy funding.

title: Jack Henry's (JKHY) Lending Platform Gets Selected by BCT
text: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) announces that its lending division has collaborated with Bank of Charles Town for automating the latter's commercial lending.

title: BCT-Bank of Charles Town Automates Commercial Lending with Jack Henry
text: CHARLES TOWN, W.Va., Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- (OTC:PTBS) – BCT-Bank of Charles Town , also known as The Community's Bank, today announced it will digitize its commercial lending experience through a collaboration with Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY).

title: Old Missouri Bank Selects Jack Henry to Power New Growth and Digital Brand
text: MONETT, Mo., Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Old Missouri Bank (OMB) selected Jack Henry to provide a modern and open banking platform as part of the bank's expansion.

title: Bank of Charles Town Automates Commercial Lending with Jack Henry
text: MONETT, Mo., Jan. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Bank of Charles Town (BCT) is collaborating with Jack Henry Lending to digitize its commercial lending experience.
